title: schoenus fluitans
intro: Schoenus fluitans, also known as floating saw-sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Schoenus fluitans include its antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive issues, including diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of Schoenus fluitans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
